intro.headline: Executive Assistant & AI Operations Coordinator | Streamlining workflows at Signikant

about:
I'm an executive assistant who fell in love with AI tools — and never looked back.

At Signikant, I support the Director while leading our internal push to integrate intelligent automation into daily operations. What started as curiosity about ChatGPT turned into a full-blown mission: making every team member's workflow a little smoother, a little smarter.

My days are a mix of stakeholder coordination, calendar tetris, and evaluating the latest AI tools for real business use (not just demos that look cool on Twitter). I've helped our team cut meeting prep time in half and built documentation systems that actually get used.

Before Signikant, I spent four years at agencies and studios where I learned that the best processes are invisible — they just work. Now I bring that philosophy to AI integration.

What I care about:
• Making AI practical, not theoretical
• Building processes that scale without breaking
• Helping people work smarter, not longer
• The Copenhagen tech scene and its quiet innovation

Always happy to connect with fellow operations-minded people, AI enthusiasts, or anyone navigating the intersection of admin work and technology. Drop me a message — I don't bite.

values.title: Executive Assistant & AI Operations Coordinator
values.description:
Supporting the Director with strategic planning, stakeholder communications, and day-to-day operations. Leading the adoption of AI-powered tools across the organization to improve team productivity and decision-making.

Key initiatives:
• Evaluated and deployed 12+ AI tools across content, scheduling, and research workflows
• Built an internal AI guidelines handbook adopted by the entire team
• Reduced weekly meeting prep time by 50% through automated briefing generation
• Coordinated cross-functional projects between engineering, design, and operations

values.title: Administrative Coordinator
values.description:
Coordinated office operations for a 40-person digital agency. Managed vendor relationships, organized quarterly client events, and maintained internal knowledge bases.

Highlights:
• Introduced structured project tracking that reduced missed deadlines by 35%
• Managed a 200K DKK annual procurement budget
• Organized 8 client events with 50-150 attendees each
• Onboarded 15+ new hires with a self-service documentation system

values.title: Office Manager
values.description:
Managed all administrative functions for a creative design studio of 15 people. Handled budgeting, procurement, team scheduling, and vendor relations.

Highlights:
• Organized the annual company retreat (3 years running)
• Managed relationships with 20+ freelance contractors
• Digitized the studio's paper-based filing system, saving ~5 hours/week

values.title: Reception & Admin Intern
values.description: Reception desk coordination, patient scheduling support, and document management for the administrative wing. First exposure to high-stakes operations where precision and empathy both matter.

Focused on organizational management and digital transformation. Completed thesis on "AI-Assisted Decision Making in Small and Medium Enterprises" — received top marks.

Activities: Student Council, Business Case Competition (3rd place, 2019), CBS Entrepreneurship Club.
Upper secondary education with focus on mathematics, social sciences, and English.

values.title: AI Tools Evaluation Framework
values.description: Designed and maintain an internal framework for evaluating AI tools before company-wide adoption. Covers criteria like data privacy compliance, integration capability, learning curve, and actual productivity impact vs. marketing claims. Used to assess 12+ tools in the first year.

values.title: Automated Meeting Briefing System
values.description: Built a semi-automated system that generates pre-meeting briefing documents by pulling context from calendar events, recent emails, and project trackers. Reduced Director's meeting prep from ~20 minutes to ~10 minutes per meeting.

Facilitate monthly workshops introducing non-technical professionals to practical AI tools for productivity and workflow automation. Topics have included prompt engineering for everyday tasks, AI-assisted writing, and building personal knowledge management systems.

Mentor Business Administration students on career transitions into operations and admin-tech roles. Monthly 1-on-1 sessions focused on practical skills, networking, and navigating the Danish job market.

values.title: Employee of the Quarter — Innovation
values.description: Recognized for introducing structured project tracking and self-service onboarding documentation that measurably improved team efficiency.

values.title: CBS Business Case Competition — 3rd Place
values.description: Team of four tackling a real business challenge from Novo Nordisk on digital transformation of internal communication.
